recommendations.title: Alice, Sweet Alice

recommendations.title: Hellraiser: Deader
recommendations.overview: When a tough-as-nails reporter is lead to a mysterious cult and the evil Pinhead, any moment could be her last.

recommendations.title: Stag Night
recommendations.overview: Four guys on a bachelor party get off the subway at a station that shut down in the 70's and, after watching a transit cop get brutally murdered, find themselves running for their lives beneath the streets of NY.

recommendations.title: Deadly Blessing
recommendations.overview: When a former member of a religious cult dies in a mysterious accident, Martha, who now lives alone and close to the cult's church, begins to fear for her life and the lives of her visiting friends.

recommendations.title: The Call of Cthulhu

recommendations.overview: After a botched heist, Eddie  a murderous crime boss, hunts down the seductive thief Karen who failed him. In order to win back Eddie’s trust, Karen recruits her ex-lover and premier thief Jack to steal a cargo of rare precious gems. But when the job

recommendations.title: Metro
recommendations.overview: Terror strikes the underground train system in Moscow in the form of a flood from a collapsed tunnel. The film follows a diverse group of Moscow citizens who find themselves trapped in the city’s underground rail network, their train derailed and vir

recommendations.title: Night Shift
recommendations.overview: A young nurse with a domestic abuse past starts working the night shift at a small hospital, where, during the night, the ghost of a nurse materializes.

recommendations.title: The Real McCoy

recommendations.title: Striking Rescue
recommendations.overview: A veteran Muay Thai expert goes on a take-no-prisoners mission of revenge after his wife and daughter are brutally murdered by mysterious forces.
